testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandlerTest

testcase.name: rejects checksum without sha256 prefix (non-sha256 format)()
registered under upgrade key in dispatcher()
rejects URL not on releases slogr io()

testsuite.system-out: 09:46:07.474 [Test worker @coroutine#1] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must start with 'sha256:' 09:46:07.545 [Test worker @coroutine#2] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must start with 'sha256:' 09:46:07.677 [Test worker @coroutine#3] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.695 [Test worker @coroutine#4] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must use https scheme 09:46:07.709 [Test worker @coroutine#5] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: missing download_url
